text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: What's it take to be an adult?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After asking for more details, I learn that her
question was triggered by a certain incident that
unfolded yesterday.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Man, I can't wait to see the baby whale!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Oh, there's the ticket booth. 'Scuse me, ma'am!

text_block_list.name: Ticket Staff
text_block_list.text: Two tickets with the kids' discount?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Do we look like kids?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I'll admit I'm kinda on the small side, but still!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
How could anyone see such bold, mature
Umamusume and mistake 'em for some
grade-school babies?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
...I mean, we genuinely are too old for the kids
discount.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
But we gotta face the facts—that ticket seller
thought we were kids. We gotta calm down and
think this through.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
We figured we'd get an adult's input, and you're
the closest one I've got on deck!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
So whaddya think? Is it the way we act? How we
talk? Our looks? Lay it on us.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
What do we gotta do to start givin' off some real
adult vibes?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's not the easiest question to answer, but the
first thing that comes to mind is...
choice_data_list: Adults are good at handling themselves!
Adults are good at saving money!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Handlin' ourselves, eh? Ya mean like handlin'
everythin' without relyin' on others to help ya?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: But we just relied on...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Well, let's just try it first!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
First up, we gotta get ourselves up and outta bed
to start the day! Good mooornin'!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And a good amount of exercise makes for a
healthy lifestyle! Just like with trainin'.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And I gotta prepare my own meals! And I also
gotta balance the food groups out, without bein'
picky. Bon appetit!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hey, this is just my regular routine!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
But doesn't that mean we've been adults all
along?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, it does. Can't believe I was sweatin'
somethin' so small. That was way outta character.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the problem resolving on its own, Tamamo
Cross and Inari One saunter outside looking
completely at ease.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Savings? Well, I already got some savings, but...
is that really what bein' an adult's all about?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...Well, whatever. Since it's comin' from you, I
might as well give it a shot.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Okay, so all I gotta do is pile up some savin's!
Time to get the cash rollin' in!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days later...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Come one, come all!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
For a limited time, one servin' of takoyaki is just
250 yen! Save by getting two for 400 yen!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Oh! That's the takoyaki everyone's been raving
about! Excuse me, could I get two servings?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: I'll take four—no, make that six!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Much appreciated! At this rate, we'll be sold out
in no time!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Gettin' sales numbers like these in a single day is
nothin' to sniff at! No doubt about it, we're
definitely real adults now!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Wahahaha! This is practically Tracen's kitchen
now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, the two get chewed out by Air
Groove, who stops by to investigate all the
noise... but that's a story for another day.
